trait.confidence_notes: No genome-wide significant chrX loci in current build. GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit.
trait.category: UK Biobank Assessment Centre > Touchscreen > Lifestyle and environment > Electronic device use
trait.description_more: ACE touchscreen question "For approximately how many years have you been using a mobile phone at least once per week to make or receive calls?" If the participant activated the Help button they were shown the message:     Do not include time spent text messaging. If you are unsure, please provide an estimate or select Do not know.
